/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cow_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cow_tests.dir/construction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cow_tests.dir/observers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cow_tests.dir/modifiers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cow_tests.dir/assignment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cow_tests.dir/comparison.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cow_tests.dir/hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cow_tests.dir/allocator.cpp.o -o cow_tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
